race_meta.race_name: First Past The Post At CopyBet Veterans' Handicap Chase

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Actual winner tommy's oscar (ire) was not in model's ranked horses. Model focused too heavily on pre-race favorites. Top prediction was Tommy's Oscar with 38.0% confidence.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Tommy's Oscar > Hillcrest, but actual result was Tommy's Oscar (IRE) > Credo (IRE). Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Actual winner not found in market analysis. Market dynamics shifted unexpectedly from pre-race state.
